# `collaboration` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `CollaborationParticipant`

```prisma
model CollaborationParticipant {
  id            String    @id @default(uuid())
  moduleType    String // 'group_expense' | 'todo_list' | 'goal'
  moduleId      String
  moduleName    String? // snapshot of the title at invite time, for emails
  email         String
  name          String?
  userId        String? // set once resolved/linked to a registered user
  status        String    @default("PENDING_REGISTRATION") // REGISTERED | PENDING_REGISTRATION
  invitedBy     String
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt
  linkedAt      DateTime?
  user          User?     @relation("CollaborationParticipant_user", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  invitedByUser User      @relation("CollaborationParticipant_invitedBy", fields: [invitedBy], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([moduleType, moduleId, email])
  @@index([email])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([moduleType, moduleId])
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `ChatMessage`

```prisma
model ChatMessage {
  id        String         @id @default(uuid())
  sessionId String
  senderId  String
  message   String
  timestamp DateTime       @default(now())
  sender    User           @relation(fields: [senderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  session   AdvisorSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([senderId])
  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([timestamp])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
